workflow_engine_wbtest.mbt.name: WorkflowEngine executes steps in order and passes outputs
WorkflowEngine retries a failing step and persists retry count
WorkflowEngine fails the run when a step exhausts retries
WorkflowEngine persists controller decisions from step output when policy allows it
WorkflowEngine accepts looser controller decision output shapes
WorkflowEngine cancels before the next step when control requests stop
WorkflowEngine warns on unexpected verdicts but still persists them
WorkflowEngine uses configured next_iteration field mappings

ui_snapshot_wbtest.mbt.name: build_job_ui_snapshot includes proposal workflow steps child runs and timeline
build_job_ui_snapshot includes explicit handoffs when provided
build_job_ui_snapshot adds split and merge nodes for controller runs

system_storage_wbtest.mbt.name: SystemStore persists definitions workflows runs steps and artifacts
SystemStore keeps indexes and per-run files in expected layout
SystemStore persists job proposals and run events

subjob_wbtest.mbt.name: subjob_step_handler creates a child run with lineage and executes it
controller delegate step records iteration state and child lineage
subjob_step_handler applies explicit child profile to the planned child job

runtime_wbtest.mbt.name: RuntimeManager persists checkpoints and prevents duplicate active runs
RuntimeManager returns due scheduled definitions from checkpoints
RuntimeManager triggers due runs and exposes active and recent status
RuntimeManager schedules retry runs with backoff and resets retry state on success
RuntimeManager initializes controller state for controller jobs

run_workspace_wbtest.mbt.name: prepare_run_workspace creates dedicated git-backed workspace with inherited memory
prepare_run_workspace nests child runs under parent workspace

proposal_wbtest.mbt.name: draft_job_proposal creates non-executing draft with steps
plan_job_proposal applies configured controller profile steps
proposal_as_workflow builds generic analysis workflow with notify config
plan_job_proposal uses model JSON when available
profile json drives controller policy through compilation into runtime
plan_job_proposal includes relevant memory context in planner prompt
revise_job_proposal updates draft from model JSON
revise_job_proposal includes memory context in revise prompt
revise_job_proposal carries prior revision history into later revisions
proposal_as_workflow preserves generic drafts as direct proposal workflows
render_job_proposal_for_chat includes proposal steps
ensure_draft_proposal rejects non-draft proposals
save_confirmed_job_proposal persists confirmed status and run id
save_rejected_job_proposal persists rejected status

profile_wbtest.mbt.name: load_job_profile reads controller profile from moonclaw.jobs.json

memory_wbtest.mbt.name: MemoryService persists and reloads scoped memory records
MemoryService search filters by scope and ignores archived records

memory_capture_wbtest.mbt.name: capture_successful_run_memories stores run summary and report artifacts

executor_wbtest.mbt.name: execute_run_lifecycle runs workflow and invokes hooks
execution_notification_hooks sends start and finish notifications

display_wbtest.mbt.name: human readable ids include slug and short suffix
unwrapped_epoch_ms_near restores wrapped timestamps near current era

control_service_wbtest.mbt.name: request_job_stop resolves run ids before calling cancel

compiler_wbtest.mbt.name: compile_job_proposal preserves proposal step structure for generic requests
compile_job_proposal builds direct workflow for generic requests
compile_job_proposal preserves custom step kinds directly
compile_job_proposal applies analysis metadata from proposal steps
compile_job_proposal preserves analysis execution routing hints

chat_wbtest.mbt.name: ChatService retrieves active artifacts and returns citations
ChatService applies persisted chat bindings to artifact scope

chat_service_wbtest.mbt.name: decide_active_job_notifications emits verbose progress and heartbeat
decide_active_job_notifications warns once for long-running jobs
decide_active_job_notifications emits step start for normal verbosity
resolve_job_notify_target applies persisted preference overrides
parse_job_notify_target accepts legacy optional-json array encoding
render_confirmed_job_reply includes title and created time
save_job_notification_preference preserves created_at when updating
save_presented_job_proposal stores presented message id
resolve_target_proposal prefers explicit id and falls back to reply lookup
proposal command render helpers produce expected text
dispatch_job_chat_action routes commands through callbacks

artifact_store_wbtest.mbt.name: ArtifactStore writes reads and filters artifacts
ArtifactStore supports append-only versions and mutable overwrite
ArtifactStore archives and cleans up artifacts by retention policy
